response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive senior engineering experience and a strong open-source background, he falls short on the executive leadership and formal team management requirements. Crucially, his basic German proficiency does not meet the strict C1 requirement necessary for client advisory and consulting in this role.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software development experience across diverse tech stacks and open-source projects.
Proven initiative in architectural design and founding an open-source platform (GISCollective).
Holds a university degree in Computer Science and demonstrates strong Linux/Unix familiarity.
concerns: German language proficiency is basic, falling far short of the required C1 minimum.
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership and formal team management experience.
No mention of UML expertise, IT security, or risk management compliance in the resume.
